signals.title: ContextLayer Labs product overview
signals.content: A fictional vendor page describes context routing, provenance checks, and enterprise integrations.
signals.review_note: Relevant vendor page, but promotional source should remain background.

signals.title: RetrievalWorks funding announcement
signals.content: A fictional company announcement claims new funding for enterprise retrieval governance.

signals.title: Older vector search comparison
signals.content: An older comparison is useful background but predates current agentic retrieval patterns.

signals.title: Undated vendor capability page
signals.content: A vendor page lists capabilities but does not show a publication date.
signals.review_note: Marketing source without a date needs verification.

signals.title: Malformed acquisition rumor date
signals.content: A fictional rumor post has malformed date metadata and weak provenance.
signals.review_note: Rumor-like source should not drive a diligence decision.

signals.title: Future-dated launch page
signals.content: A launch page appears to be dated after retrieval time.

signals.title: Blocked vendor comparison
signals.content: [ERROR] access denied by vendor comparison page

signals.title: Low relevance AI glossary
signals.content: A generic AI glossary mentions retrieval but does not help evaluate vendor strategy.

signals.title: Overscored customer quote
signals.content: A short customer quote has limited diligence value but an oversized caller score.
signals.review_note: A short quote with an oversized score should not be treated as strong diligence evidence.

signals.title: Underscored technical brief
signals.content: A technical brief contains useful architecture details but an invalid negative score.

signals.title: Current pricing documentation
signals.content: A fictional pricing page gives current packaging and integration clues.

signals.title: Independent market note
signals.content: A neutral analyst note compares context quality tools and retrieval governance vendors.
signals.review_note: Third-party market note is useful as background evidence.
